location_precision.why: Every one of the seven findings carries a usable file:line, e.g. 'src/sync.py:14' and 'src/report.py:11'.

interaction_synthesis.why: The sync.py:31 finding mechanistically explains that marking a user seen before the try block 'compound[s] the persistent-default bug at line 24 into permanent data loss for that user.'

causal_clarity.why: Each finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. 'range(total_count // PAGE_SIZE) drops the final partial page, so the last total_count % 100 staged users are never fetched.'
